title: Housing and Urban Life
blurb: Ethnographic studies of social housing, informal settlements, and urban displacement — tracing how communities navigate eviction, redevelopment, and the politics of home in Indonesia's cities.

title: Children and Youth
blurb: Research on childhood poverty, wellbeing, and the social policies that shape young lives across Indonesia — from birth registration to schooling, welfare, and beyond.

title: Youth and Climate
blurb: How young people across coastal and rural Indonesia understand, navigate, and respond to the long-term consequences of environmental change and policy failures.
